text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we're walking through the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-hey, Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-hey, Big Sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Here... th-this is for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a piece of paper from Rice Shower's
trembling hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Urara told me about it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There's a New Year's raffle in the shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The special prize is supposed to be something
really incredible! So... um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I got you a ticket. I want you to give it a try.
choice_data_list: Why don't we do it together?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I got you a ticket. I want you to give it a try.
choice_data_list: Why don't we do it together?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? No way! If I'm involved, there's no way we'll
w—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We've got some takers! Step on up and give it a
shot!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you really want to do it... together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Praying for good luck, we grasp the raffle
spinner's handle together and turn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! You did it, you did it! Congrats, Big
Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! You did it, you did it! Congrats, Big
Sister!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but you're the one who won, not me.
choice_data_list: We pulled the spinner together, didn't we?
We pulled the spinner together, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but you're the one who won, not me.
choice_data_list: We pulled the spinner together, didn't we?
We pulled the spinner together, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The grand-prize is just as much hers as it is mine.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Is it really okay for me to take it too?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm... in that case... d-does...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean... we'll go to the hot spring
together?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Since we both won... I'd like to go with you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is that okay?
choice_data_list: If that's what you want, then of course!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well then, once we've done everything we
want to do and need a break, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well then, once we've done everything we
want to do and need a break, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Rice Shower and I promise to use the hot
spring vacation ticket together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: F-first-prize?! I can't believe it!
choice_data_list:
It's all thanks to you pulling the spinner with
me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: F-first-prize?! I can't believe it!
choice_data_list:
It's all thanks to you pulling the spinner with
me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I don't know about that.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: All right, you two! Here's your prize!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... It looks delicious. My mouth is already
wateri—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrooowl...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Agh! Not now, tummy! Everyone's watching!
choice_data_list: Let's hurry back so we can eat.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yes, let's!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like she's worked up an appetite to
match the surprise and happiness she got from
playing the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy the delicious deluxe carrot hamburger
steak together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... there are so many!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Look at all these carrots!
choice_data_list: How are you going to eat all of those?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Look at all these carrots!
choice_data_list: How are you going to eat all of those?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! You're right. I don't know if my tummy has
room for this many.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, let's think... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I make some sweets out of them, will you have
some?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I make some sweets out of them, will you have
some?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'm gonna make a ton, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I enjoy some homemade carrot
cookies with Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We didn't lose!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We didn't lose!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I can't believe it. I thought my bad luck
would bring us absolutely nothing, like always...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be third-prize, but a win is a win. Rice
Shower keeps the carrot as a memento of our day
together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Of course I lost. I'm sorry.
choice_data_list: Still, thanks for trying with me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Of course I lost. I'm sorry.
choice_data_list: Still, thanks for trying with me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I wanted you to get a good prize... Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly give Rice Shower a tissue from the pack
to wipe her tears.
